name: enter_castleSecond_seize
_source: #You'd put the dialogue and stuff that happens upon seizing here.
speak;{unit};This castle is ours!{w}{br}What a momentous occasion!
#Remove the 'seize' region and tell the game to spawn the 'visit' region.
#This MUST follow the format "_castle(name)_occupants". The code will not execute properly if you don't do this!
#Makes the unit who seized this castle end their turn.
